creator: adamw@FreeBSD.org
text:
When I install a fresh www/instiki, I am told to go to http://localhost:2500 to configure. When I do, I get the following. [adamw@apnoea ~]$ telnet localhost 2500 Trying 127.0.0.1... Connected to localhost. Escape character is '^]'. GET / Internal Server Error

Internal Server Error

undefined method `each' for nil:NilClass
WEBrick/1.3.1 (Ruby/1.8.7/2009-12-24) at localhost:2500
Connection closed by foreign host. I get this problem on every box I test it on. I don't know if this is FreeBSD-specific or not, or whether it works if you already have instiki installed and configured.
